Radiant Node for Windows
========================

Installation:
1. Keep 'RadiantCore.exe' and 'radiant-core-windows-x64.zip' in the same folder.
2. Run 'RadiantCore.exe'.

The application will automatically detect the local zip file and install the node binaries.
The GUI will launch in your default web browser.

Files:
- RadiantCore.exe: The graphical user interface and node manager.
- radiant-core-windows-x64.zip: Contains the actual node software (radiantd.exe, radiant-cli.exe) and required libraries.
